score_rules.title: 中国宝宝
score_rules.description: 你的中国梗知识还在启蒙阶段，继续加油！

score_rules.title: 老外里的中国通
score_rules.description: 你已经能听懂不少弦外之音了！

score_rules.title: 精神中国人
score_rules.description: 你的灵魂已经在中国办了暂住证！

score_rules.title: 中国梗王
score_rules.description: 满分！你可以去考“中国梗十级”证书了！

questions.text: What is 油条 usually eaten with?
questions.explanation: 中式经典早餐搭配，油条酥脆，豆浆香浓，甜咸搭配皆可，全国普及。

questions.text: What does "破防了" mean?
questions.explanation: 情绪被击溃。

questions.text: What does 固件 mean?
questions.explanation: 设备底层控制系统。

questions.text: What does "潜力股" mean for a new employee?
options: 现在一般但未来好（画饼）| Potential talent
潜力股（关系户）| Relationship hire
questions.explanation: 领导夸新人但不给资源，如 “你是潜力股，再磨练几年”，表画饼。

questions.text: What does 俺也一样 mean in Northern dialects?
options: 俺也喜欢 | I like it too
俺也想去 | I want to go too
questions.explanation: 北方话经典台词，源自《三国演义》，现变成表情包，别人说什么，你接 “俺也一样”，主打一个 “附和天花板”。

questions.text: What does 扫码 mean?
options: 扫二维码丨 Scan QR code
questions.explanation: 支付、加好友常用操作。

questions.text: What does 辛苦啦 mean?
options: 你很累丨 You are tired
感谢付出丨 Thanks for your effort
你很辛苦丨 You work hard
questions.explanation: 日常礼貌夸赞，感谢对方帮忙 / 工作。

questions.text: What does 埋单啦 mean in Cantonese?
options: 埋掉账单啦 | Bury the bill
付账啦 | Pay for the meal
questions.explanation: 粤语经典用语，现全国通用，吃完饭喊 “埋单啦”，比 “买单” 更有味道，港式氛围感拉满。

questions.text: What does "复盘" mean after a project?
options: 总结经验（找问题）| Review and summarize
questions.explanation: 项目结束后总结，如 “今天复盘这个项目，找不足”，表总结问题。

questions.text: What does 流量 mean?
questions.explanation: 手机上网消耗的数据。

questions.text: What does 没事儿 mean?
options: 没关系 / 没事 | It’s okay / No problem
questions.explanation: 日常礼貌用语，用来回应道歉、感谢，比如 “没事儿，不用谢”“没事儿，别在意”。

questions.text: What does "烂片" mean?
options: 烂的片子（食物）| Rotten film
不好看的电影（差评）| Bad movie
questions.explanation: 观众对质量差的电影的评价，如 “这部电影是烂片，别去看”。

questions.text: What does 中不中 mean in Henan dialect?
options: 成不成 | Make it or not
questions.explanation: 河南方言经典问句，对应普通话 “行不行”，日常沟通、商量事常用。

questions.text: What does "UFO 你" mean?
questions.explanation: 把你当外人，不跟你一条心。

questions.text: What does 无事不登三宝殿 mean?
options: 没事情就不去寺庙 | Don't go to the temple without reason
有事才来找别人 | Only come to someone when you need help
三宝殿没有事 | There's nothing in the Three Treasures Hall
喜欢登三宝殿 | Like to climb the Three Treasures Hall
questions.explanation: 比喻人平时不联系，一联系就是有事相求，比如 “他平时不找我，今天突然打电话，无事不登三宝殿”。

questions.text: What does yyds mean?
options: 你你做事 | You you do something
永远的神 | Forever God / The best
好好做 | Yes yes do it
questions.explanation: 网络缩写，源自 “永远的神”，用来夸赞人 / 事物极度优秀，是中文互联网最火的缩写之一。

questions.text: What does "内卷" mean?
questions.explanation: 无意义竞争导致内耗。

questions.text: What does 优化 mean?
questions.explanation: 让软件 / 系统更好用。

questions.text: What does 再说吧 mean?
options: 再说一遍丨 Say it again
questions.explanation: 委婉拖延 / 拒绝，不直接否定。

questions.text: What does 抓手清晰 mean?
questions.explanation: 工作方向、方法明确。

questions.text: What does 豁出去 mean in Shaanxi dialect?
questions.explanation: 陕西方言，表下定决心做某事，不顾后果，如 “为了赢，我豁出去了”。

questions.text: What does "嗑 CP" mean?
options: 喜欢一对 CP|Ship a couple
吃 CP 零食 | Eat CP snacks
questions.explanation: 指观众喜欢并追捧剧里 / 综艺里的情侣组合，“嗑到了”= 感到甜。

questions.text: What does 备份 mean?
questions.explanation: 复制数据防止丢失。

questions.text: What does 抓手不足 mean?
options: 手不够丨 Not enough hands
questions.explanation: 缺少工作切入点与方法。

questions.text: What does 得过且过 mean?
options: 凑合过日子 | Get by, muddle through
赢了通过 | Win and pass
必须得到 | Have to get
questions.explanation: 指对生活没有追求，敷衍了事，混一天是一天，是贬义词。

questions.text: What does 打车 mean?
options: 打出租车 | Take a taxi
questions.explanation: 指乘坐出租车 / 网约车，是中国城市日常出行的常用方式，网约车 APP 普及。

questions.text: What does 打通链路 mean?
questions.explanation: 让工作流程顺畅无阻碍。

questions.text: What does 直播 mean?
questions.explanation: 实时播出视频内容。

questions.text: What does "赋能" mean from a leader?
questions.explanation: 领导说给你支持，如 “公司会赋能新人，提供培训”，表给资源。

questions.text: What does "蚌埠住了" mean?
options: 蚌埠城市 | City of Bengbu
绷不住了 | Can't hold back
questions.explanation: 谐音 “绷不住了”，指情绪到极点，笑 / 哭到控制不住。

questions.text: What does "大局观" mean from a leader?
options: 牺牲你的利益（顾整体）| Sacrifice your benefit
看大局（战略）| See the big picture
大局（公司利益）| Company benefit
观大局（个人能力）| Personal ability
questions.explanation: 领导让你妥协，如 “要有大局观，这个项目先让给别人”，表牺牲个人。

questions.text: What does "协同作战" mean in a project?
options: 一起作战（团队）| Team work
多部门配合（可能甩锅）| Cooperate with departments
questions.explanation: 指多个部门一起做项目，但可能互相甩锅，如 “这个项目需要协同作战，各部门配合”。

questions.text: What does 埋单 mean in Cantonese?
options: 埋掉账单 | Bury the bill
付账 | Pay for the meal
questions.explanation: 粤语经典用语，现全国通用，指吃完饭支付费用，替代 “买单” 更具特色。

questions.text: What does 放水 mean in talent shows?
options: 往舞台上放水 | Pour water on the stage
评委故意降低标准 | Judges lower the standard on purpose
选手喝水 | Contestants drink water
舞台有水 | There is water on the stage
questions.explanation: 选秀综艺常用梗，指评委对喜欢的选手故意放宽要求，“放水”=“开绿灯”。

questions.text: What does 取关 mean?
questions.explanation: 不再关注账号。

questions.text: What does 指纹 mean?
questions.explanation: 指纹识别解锁设备。

questions.text: What does "弹性工作" mean in a job offer?
options: 弹性（早来早走）| Flexible time
加班没加班费（自由是幌子）| Flexible but overtime
弹性（在家办公）| Work from home
questions.explanation: 表面说时间自由，实际要求随叫随到，如 “我们公司弹性工作，需要时要加班”。

questions.text: What does 等一下 mean?
options: 等一下下丨 Wait a bit
questions.explanation: 让对方短暂等待。

questions.text: What does 颗粒度细化 mean?
questions.explanation: 把内容做得更细致具体。

questions.text: What does 挖野菜 come from?
options: 《薛平贵与王宝钏》|Xue Pinggui and Wang Baochuan
《如懿传》|Ruyi's Royal Love in the Palace
questions.explanation: 王宝钏为等薛平贵，在寒窑挖了 18 年野菜，现用来调侃恋爱脑，“挖野菜”=“恋爱脑实锤”。

questions.text: What does 尊嘟假嘟 mean?
options: 尊嘟假嘟是拟声词 | Onomatopoeia
questions.explanation: 网络萌系谐音，“真的假的” 的可爱说法，用来表达惊讶、质疑，年轻人聊天常用。

questions.text: What does 降本增效 mean?
options: 节约提效丨 Cost down & efficiency up
questions.explanation: 节约成本，提升效率。

questions.text: What is 故宫 the former palace of?
options: Ming and Qing dynasties | 明清两代
Tang and Song dynasties | 唐宋两代
Qin and Han dynasties | 秦汉两代
Sui and Tang dynasties | 隋唐两代
questions.explanation: 故宫又称紫禁城，是明清两代的皇宫，位于北京，是中国现存最完整的古代宫殿建筑群。

questions.text: What does 没问题 mean?
options: 有问题丨 There's a problem
不知道丨 I don't know
questions.explanation: 表示答应、能做到、放心。

questions.text: What does 吃了吗 mean?
options: 问吃饭丨 Ask if you ate
questions.explanation: 经典寒暄，不是真问你吃饭没。

questions.text: What does 别来无恙 mean?
options: 一切都好丨 All is well
别受伤丨 Don't get hurt
questions.explanation: 久别重逢问候语。

questions.text: What does 对齐目标 mean?
questions.explanation: 团队目标保持一致。

questions.text: What does "泰裤辣" mean?
questions.explanation: 谐音 “太酷了”，源自网红梗，用来夸赞事物超酷，语气夸张有感染力。

questions.text: What does "闭环" mean in a work report?
options: 事情有始有终（完成）| Close the loop
闭环（技术术语）| Technical term
questions.explanation: 职场术语，表任务完成，如 “这个任务要形成闭环，下周给结果”。

questions.text: What does 三个臭皮匠顶个诸葛亮 mean?
options: 三个皮匠比诸葛亮厉害 | Three cobblers better than Zhuge Liang
人多智慧多 | Two heads are better than one
皮匠很聪明 | Cobblers are smart
诸葛亮很厉害 | Zhuge Liang is smart
questions.explanation: 诸葛亮是三国顶级智者，比喻集体的智慧超过个人，人多力量大。

questions.text: What does 见外了 mean?
questions.explanation: 让对方不要客气，像家人一样。

questions.text: What does 网速 mean?
questions.explanation: 网络传输数据速度。

questions.text: What does 一山不容二虎 mean?
options: 一座山不能有两只老虎 | A mountain can't hold two tigers
一个地方不能有两个强者 | A place can't have two strong people
老虎喜欢独居 | Tigers like to live alone
山太小容不下老虎 | The mountain is too small for tigers
questions.explanation: 比喻一个团队或地方，不能有两个实力相当的领导者，否则会起矛盾，主打一个 “一山难容二主”。

questions.text: What does 守株待兔 mean?
options: 守着树桩等兔子 | Wait for rabbit by the stump
侥幸心理 | Rely on luck
questions.explanation: 源自寓言，比喻抱着侥幸心理，妄想不劳而获，也比喻死守狭隘的经验。

questions.text: What does 嗑到了 mean when watching variety shows?
options: 磕到桌子了 | Knock into the table
磕到 CP 了 | Ship the couple
摔倒磕到了 | Fall and knock
questions.explanation: 观众看综艺的快乐，指看到嘉宾之间的甜蜜互动，忍不住磕他们的 CP，比如 “这对嘉宾互动好甜，我嗑到了”。

questions.text: What does 里程碑 mean?
questions.explanation: 项目的重要阶段节点。

questions.text: What does "每逢佳节倍思亲" mean?
options: 节日更想家（思念）| Miss family more on festivals
questions.explanation: 王维诗句，表节日时对亲人的思念更强烈。

questions.text: What does "卷不动了" mean?
options: 不想卷 | Don't want to involute
questions.explanation: 无法继续内卷。

questions.text: What does 随便你 mean?
options: 你决定丨 Up to you
我不管丨 I don't care
我不听丨 I won't listen
questions.explanation: 表示不干涉，由对方决定。

questions.text: What does 躺平 mean?
options: 躺在地上 | Lie on the floor
不内卷，低欲望生活 | Avoid competition, low-desire life
questions.explanation: 指年轻人放弃过度竞争，选择低欲望、佛系的生活方式，是中国年轻人的流行生活态度。

questions.text: What does "疑是银河落九天" mean?
options: 银河（小河）| Milky Way (small river)
瀑布像银河（夸张）| Waterfall like Milky Way
落九天（低）| Fall nine days (low)
questions.explanation: 李白诗句，用夸张手法写瀑布像银河从天上落下。

questions.text: What does 投屏 mean?
questions.explanation: 把画面投到电视 / 显示器。

questions.text: What does 解锁 mean?
questions.explanation: 解开手机 / 设备锁。

questions.text: What is 扫码支付？
options: 扫码付款 | Scan code to pay
questions.explanation: 中国移动支付核心方式，用手机扫二维码付款，是中国人日常最常用的支付方式。

questions.text: What does "走个流程" mean in a company?
options: 按规定办（可能拖延）| Go through procedures
走流程（快速通过）| Quick process
流程（简单步骤）| Simple process
走流程（必须做）| Must do process
questions.explanation: 指按公司规定办理，可能需要等很久，如 “报销要走个流程，下周下来”。

questions.text: What does 我尽力 mean?
options: 我努力丨 I'll try my best
我会做丨 I'll do it
questions.explanation: 表示会努力，但不保证结果。

questions.text: What does 横向协同 mean?
options: 跨部门配合丨 Cross-department collaboration
questions.explanation: 与平级部门配合工作。

questions.text: What does 快到了 mean?
questions.explanation: 告诉对方距离目的地很近。

questions.text: What is 长城 built for?
questions.explanation: 长城是中国古代军事防御工程，始建于春秋战国，秦代统一修缮，抵御北方游牧民族。

questions.text: What does 打扰了 mean?
options: 抱歉打扰丨 Sorry to disturb
questions.explanation: 拜访、请教、打断别人时的礼貌用语。

questions.text: What does "没事哒没事哒" mean?
questions.explanation: 源自短视频，年轻人自我安慰口头禅。

questions.text: What does 保重 mean?
options: 照顾好自己丨 Take care
questions.explanation: 告别时祝福对方健康平安。

questions.text: What does 清爽 mean in Wu dialect?
questions.explanation: 吴语（上海、苏州等），既指环境干净，也可形容人心情舒畅、做事利落。

questions.text: What does 交付物 mean?
questions.explanation: 需要提交的工作产出物。

questions.text: What does 敬酒 mean?
options: 敬酒，举杯祝福 | Toast with wine
questions.explanation: 中国餐桌礼仪，宴席上向长辈 / 客人举杯敬酒，表达尊敬和祝福，是重要社交礼仪。

questions.text: What does "真香" mean?
questions.explanation: 指之前拒绝，后来真香，现用来表示打脸或真香定律。

questions.text: What does 随便 mean when choosing food?
options: 都可以丨 Anything is okay
我不吃丨 I don't eat
questions.explanation: 日常常用，表不挑剔、听对方安排。

questions.text: What does 缓存 mean?
questions.explanation: APP 临时存储的数据。

questions.text: What does 加载 mean?
questions.explanation: APP 读取显示数据。

questions.text: What does 原画 mean?
questions.explanation: 视频最高清晰度。

questions.text: What is 月饼 a symbol of?
questions.explanation: 中秋必吃美食，圆形象征团圆，分五仁、莲蓉、蛋黄等多种口味，家人共食。

questions.text: What does 断网 mean?
questions.explanation: 设备失去网络连接。

questions.text: What does "配享太庙" mean?
questions.explanation: 形容观点完全正确，封神级别。

questions.text: What does 蓝牙 mean?
questions.explanation: 近距离设备无线连接。

questions.text: What is 麻辣烫's origin?
questions.explanation: 川味经典小吃，起源于四川，汤底麻辣鲜香，可自选食材煮制，性价比高。

questions.text: What does 好久不见 mean?
options: 很久没见丨 Long time no see
昨天见过丨 Saw you yesterday
每天见丨 See you every day
第一次见丨 First time meeting
questions.explanation: 熟人见面最常用问候语。

questions.text: What does "润物细无声" describe?
questions.explanation: 杜甫《春夜喜雨》诗句，写春雨悄悄滋润万物，温柔无声。

questions.text: What does 慢走 mean when seeing someone off?
questions.explanation: 中国式送别礼貌语，不是真让对方慢走，表关心。

questions.text: What does 复盘总结 mean?
questions.explanation: 项目结束后总结经验教训。

questions.text: What does 捡了芝麻丢了西瓜 mean?
options: 捡芝麻扔西瓜 | Pick up sesame and throw away watermelon
抓小放大 | Penny wise and pound foolish
喜欢芝麻不喜欢西瓜 | Like sesame not watermelon
芝麻比西瓜小 | Sesame is smaller than watermelon
questions.explanation: 比喻贪小便宜吃大亏，只关注小事，忽略了大事，比如 “为了省几块钱绕远路，捡了芝麻丢了西瓜”。

questions.text: What does 演技炸裂 mean in a movie?
options: 演员演技超烂 | Actor's acting is terrible
演员演技超棒 | Actor's acting is amazing
演员演技一般 | Actor's acting is average
演员摔炸了 | Actor fell and exploded
questions.explanation: 夸演员演技的最高评价，指演员的表演真实、有感染力，比如 “他这段哭戏演技炸裂，看哭我了”。

questions.text: What does 冇得事 mean in Hunan dialect?
questions.explanation: 湘语（湖南话）常用语，回应道歉或关心，和普通话 “没事儿” 同义。

questions.text: What does 睁一只眼闭一只眼 mean?
options: 眼睛一只睁一只闭 | One eye open, one eye closed
假装没看见 | Turn a blind eye to something
questions.explanation: 比喻对别人的小错误不计较，假装没看见，比如 “他偶尔迟到一次，我就睁一只眼闭一只眼吧”。

questions.text: What does 剧本痕迹太重 mean?
options: 综艺的剧本写得太好 | The variety show's script is well written
综艺情节是提前设计的 | Variety show plot is pre-designed
嘉宾的剧本太多 | Guests have too many scripts
剧本上有痕迹 | There are traces on the script
questions.explanation: 观众对综艺的吐槽，指综艺的情节太假、太刻意，一看就是提前安排好的，没有真实感。

questions.text: What does 下饭综艺 mean?
options: 看了能下饭的综艺 | Variety show that makes you eat more
综艺里有美食 | There is food in the variety show
边做饭边看的综艺 | Variety show to watch while cooking
边吃饭边看的综艺 | Variety show to watch while eating
questions.explanation: 形容综艺轻松搞笑、不费脑，适合吃饭时看，比如 “这个综艺太下饭了，我能多吃一碗饭”。

questions.text: What does 吃一堑长一智 mean?
options: 吃一次亏，长一次见识 | Learn a lesson from a mistake
吃堑能变聪明 | Eating cut can make you smart
堑很好吃 | Cut is delicious
聪明的人不吃堑 | Smart people don't eat cut
questions.explanation: 比喻经历一次挫折，就会吸取一次教训，变得更聪明，比如 “这次被骗了，吃一堑长一智，下次再也不上当了”。

questions.text: What does "显眼包女友" mean?
options: 爱出风头的女友 | Show-off girlfriend
questions.explanation: 形容女友非常显眼、活泼搞笑，是女生的搞笑自嘲词。

questions.text: What does 沉浸式体验 mean in variety shows?
options: 沉入水里体验 | Experience sinking in water
全身心投入的体验 | Wholeheartedly engaged experience
戴着耳机体验 | Experience with headphones
在密室体验 | Experience in a secret room
questions.explanation: 综艺爆款玩法，比如沉浸式露营、沉浸式演戏，让嘉宾和观众全身心投入，氛围感拉满。

questions.text: What does 重启 mean?
questions.explanation: 关机再开机解决故障。

questions.text: What does 晓得不 mean in Southwest Mandarin?
options: 懂吗 | Do you get it
questions.explanation: 西南官话（四川、重庆等）常用问句，对应普通话 “知道吗”，语气随意。

questions.text: What does 画蛇添足 mean?
options: 画蛇加脚 | Draw feet on a snake
questions.explanation: 源自寓言，比喻做了多余的事，反而把事情弄糟，得不偿失。

questions.text: What does 更新 mean?
questions.explanation: 软件 / 系统升级到新版。

questions.text: What is 过桥米线 a specialty of?
questions.explanation: 云南蒙自特色美食，由汤底、米线、配菜组成，配菜烫熟后食用，汤鲜味美。

questions.text: What does 搞莫子 mean in Hunan dialect?
options: 搞什么 | What are you doing?
搞什么东西 | What are you doing?
questions.explanation: 湖南话经典问句，“搞莫子”=“搞什么”，语气直接，比如 “你在搞莫子，怎么这么慢？”。

questions.text: What does 大数据杀熟 mean?
options: 大数据把熟人杀了 | Big data kills acquaintances
平台对老用户定高价 | Platform charges old users more
大数据泄露隐私 | Big data leaks privacy
熟人生成大数据 | Acquaintances generate big data
questions.explanation: 网购 / 打车坑人梗，指平台利用大数据，对老用户比新用户定价更高，主打一个区别对待。

questions.text: What does 退退退 mean?
options: 后退三步 | Step back three times
退退退，拒绝 | Back off, refuse
questions.explanation: 源自网络名场面，用来表达拒绝、驱赶，比如 “退退退，别来沾边”，是搞笑梗。

questions.text: What does 巴适得板 mean in Sichuan dialect?
questions.explanation: 四川方言顶级夸赞，“巴适” 是舒服，“得板” 表程度，形容事物好到极致。

questions.text: What does 唠嗑不 mean in Northeast dialect?
questions.explanation: 东北话日常邀约，“唠嗑” 是聊天，比如 “晚上来我家唠嗑不，整点小酒”，主打一个东北人的热情。

questions.text: What does 抓手 mean?
questions.explanation: 工作的突破口、核心方法。

questions.text: What does 甭提 mean?
options: 不用提 | No need to mention
别提了，不用说了 | Don't mention it
questions.explanation: 口语中表别提了（多为负面），比如 “甭提了，今天太倒霉了”。

questions.text: What does 清爽伐 mean in Wu dialect?
questions.explanation: 上海 / 苏州话常用问句，既可以问环境 “这房间清爽伐？”，也可以问心情 “今天心情清爽伐？”。

questions.text: What does 咋 mean?
options: 怎么 / 为什么 | How / Why
questions.explanation: 北方方言，“怎么” 的意思，比如 “咋了”“咋办”，日常口语高频词。

questions.text: What does "遥遥领先" mean?
questions.explanation: 形容优势巨大、碾压级。

questions.text: What does "举头望明月" mean?
options: 抬头看月亮（思念）| Look up at the moon (miss)
望明月（看太阳）| Look at the sun
questions.explanation: 李白《静夜思》下句，“举头望明月，低头思故乡”，表思乡。

questions.text: What does 侬晓得伐 mean in Shanghainese?
options: 你知道吗 | Do you know?
你看见吗 | Do you see?
你听见吗 | Do you hear?
你明白吗 | Do you understand?
questions.explanation: 上海话经典问句，“侬” 是你，“晓得伐” 是知道吗，语气亲切，日常聊天常用。

questions.text: What does 抓手落地 mean?
options: 抓住落地丨 Grab and land
找到方法执行丨 Implement with method
questions.explanation: 找到切入点并执行。

questions.text: What does 回头聊 mean?
options: 回头说话丨 Turn around and talk
questions.explanation: 临时结束聊天的客套话。

questions.text: What does 闪退修复 mean?
questions.explanation: 修复 APP 突然退出问题。

questions.text: What does 上头 mean when watching a drama?
options: 头上不舒服 | Uncomfortable on the head
沉迷剧情无法自拔 | Addicted to the plot
剧情到头上 | Plot comes to the head
上头等剧情 | Wait for the plot anxiously
questions.explanation: 追剧人的真实状态，指被剧情吸引，熬夜追剧、满脑子都是剧情，主打一个 “停不下来”。

questions.text: What does 咋整啊 mean in Northeast dialect?
options: 怎么整理 | How to organize?
怎么办啊 | What to do?
怎么收拾 | How to clean up?
怎么弄啊 | How to do it?
questions.explanation: 东北话万能问句，遇到困难就说 “咋整啊”，语气着急又亲切，主打一个 “求助天花板”。

questions.text: What does 晓得喽 mean in Southwest Mandarin?
questions.explanation: 四川 / 重庆 / 贵州通用方言，“晓得” 是知道，“喽” 是语气词，答应别人时说 “晓得喽”，亲切又可爱。

questions.text: What does 我没事 mean?
options: 我有事丨 I have things
我不累丨 I'm not tired
questions.explanation: 表示自己状态正常，无需担心。

questions.text: What does 拿捏 mean?
questions.explanation: 网络 / 口语流行词，表精准掌控、拿捏住了，比如 “拿捏了”“被你拿捏了”。

questions.text: What does 冇嘢 mean in Cantonese?
options: 有事情 | Have something to do
questions.explanation: 粤语常用语，“冇” 是没有，“嘢” 是事情 / 东西，这里指没事情，回应关心时说 “冇嘢，多谢”。

questions.text: What does 睇下先 mean in Cantonese?
options: 先看一下 | Have a look first
先听一下 | Have a listen first
先尝一下 | Have a taste first
先摸一下 | Have a touch first
questions.explanation: 粤语常用语，“睇” 是看，“下先” 是先一下，比如 “等我睇下先，再决定买不买”。

questions.text: What does 落地 mean?
questions.explanation: 方案真正执行、产生结果。

questions.text: What does CPU 别人 mean?
options: 给电脑装 CPU|Install CPU for computer
用 CPU 砸人 | Hit someone with CPU
精神 PUA 别人 | Mentally PUA others
教别人用 CPU|Teach others to use CPU
questions.explanation: 网络玩梗，把 PUA 说成 CPU，指通过精神控制打压、忽悠别人，比如 “别被他 CPU 了，他在骗你”。

questions.text: What does 走着瞧 mean?
options: 等着看丨 Wait and see
走路看丨 Walk and see
questions.explanation: 表示不服气，以后看结果。

questions.text: What does 背书 mean?
questions.explanation: 权威 / 品牌为其做担保。

questions.text: What does 萝卜青菜各有所爱 mean?
options: 萝卜和青菜都好吃 | Radish and green vegetables are delicious
每个人的喜好不同 | Everyone has different tastes
喜欢萝卜不喜欢青菜 | Like radish not green vegetables
青菜比萝卜有营养 | Green vegetables are more nutritious than radish
questions.explanation: 比喻每个人的审美和喜好不一样，不用强求别人和自己一样，比如 “他喜欢甜的，你喜欢咸的，萝卜青菜各有所爱”。

questions.text: What does 跑通流程 mean?
questions.explanation: 验证流程可正常运转。

questions.text: What does 分辨率 mean?
questions.explanation: 屏幕 / 图片清晰度指标。

questions.text: What does "飞流直下三千尺" describe?
options: 三千尺（短）| Three thousand feet (short)
questions.explanation: 李白《望庐山瀑布》诗句，写瀑布从高处落下的壮观景象。

questions.text: What does 慢慢来 mean?
questions.explanation: 安慰对方不用急，从容做事。

questions.text: What does 侬好 mean in Shanghainese?
questions.explanation: 吴语（上海话）核心问候语，对应普通话 “你好”，是日常见面基础用语。

questions.text: What does "哈哈哈～被自己穷笑啦" mean?
options: 委婉说自己穷 | Euphemistically say I'm poor
笑自己穷 | Laugh at my poverty
穷到笑了 | Poor to laugh
自己很穷 | I'm very poor
questions.explanation: 年轻人自嘲梗，用搞笑的方式说自己没钱，主打一个乐观摆烂。

questions.text: What does 破防 mean?
options: 情绪被触动 | Get emotionally hit
questions.explanation: 原指游戏中防御被打破，现指心理防线被击溃，因某事感到难过、愤怒或破防。

questions.text: What does 忒好了 mean in Northern dialects?
questions.explanation: 北方话（山东 / 北京）常用夸赞，“忒” 是太、非常，比如 “这饭做得忒好了，太香了”。

questions.text: What does 离线 mean?
questions.explanation: 不连接网络使用。

questions.text: What does "栓 Q" mean?
questions.explanation: 源自 “Thank you” 的搞笑发音，日常可表示真诚感谢，也可吐槽。

questions.text: What does 输出 mean?
questions.explanation: 职场指提交工作成果。

questions.text: What does 咋地了 mean in Northeast dialect?
options: 干啥呢 | What are you doing
去哪了 | Where are you going
questions.explanation: 东北日常口语，表关心或质问，如 “你咋地了，脸色这么差”，语气亲切。

questions.text: What does 熬夜 mean?
options: 熬夜，晚睡 | Stay up late
晚睡 | Go to bed late
questions.explanation: 指很晚才睡觉，是中国年轻人、上班族的常见生活状态，网络热词 “熬夜党”。

questions.text: What does "但愿人长久" wish for?
options: 亲人平安（团圆）| Family safety (reunion)
亲人平安（团圆）| Family safety (reunion)
questions.explanation: 苏轼《水调歌头》“但愿人长久，千里共婵娟”，祝亲人平安团圆。

questions.text: What does 越狱 mean?
questions.explanation: 苹果手机解除系统限制。

questions.text: What does 打法 mean?
questions.explanation: 职场指做事策略、套路。

questions.text: What does 风险预警 mean?
questions.explanation: 提前提示可能出现的风险。

questions.text: What does "摆烂" mean?
options: 努力到极致 | Try your best
摆烂的姿势 | Posture of giving up
questions.explanation: 指停止内耗，破罐子破摔，是年轻人逃避压力的一种生活方式。

questions.text: What is "东篱" a symbol of in poetry?
questions.explanation: 陶渊明 “采菊东篱下”，“东篱” 后指代菊花和隐士生活。

questions.text: What does "名台词" mean?
options: 出名的台词（广告）| Famous ad line
名字的台词（角色名）| Name line
经典台词（流传广）| Famous line
有名的对话（访谈）| Famous dialogue
questions.explanation: 影视中让人记住的台词，如《大话西游》“如果非要加个期限” 是名台词。

questions.text: What does 结果导向 mean?
questions.explanation: 工作以最终结果为目标。

questions.text: What does 攻坚 mean?
questions.explanation: 集中力量解决难点。

questions.text: What does 点赞 mean?
questions.explanation: 社交平台表示喜欢、支持。

questions.text: What does 社牛天花板 mean?
options: 社交牛掰的最高境界 | The highest level of social butterfly
天花板上的社牛 | Social butterfly on the ceiling
社牛喜欢天花板 | Social butterfly likes ceiling
天花板是社牛 | Ceiling is a social butterfly
questions.explanation: 综艺常用梗，形容人的社交能力强到极致，比如 “他在节目上和谁都能聊，简直是社牛天花板”。

questions.text: What does 别介意 mean?
options: 别在意我丨 Don't mind me
questions.explanation: 安慰对方不要放在心上。

questions.text: What does 绝绝子 mean?
options: 绝食 | Go on a diet
questions.explanation: 网络流行语，用来形容事物极度好（绝绝子）或极度差（太绝了），语气夸张。

questions.text: What does 搬起石头砸自己的脚 mean?
options: 搬石头砸自己的脚 | Lift a stone to hit one's own foot
自作自受 | Shoot oneself in the foot
石头砸脚很疼 | A stone hitting the foot hurts
喜欢搬石头 | Like lifting stones
questions.explanation: 比喻做了坏事，最后害了自己，自食恶果，比如 “他想陷害别人，结果搬起石头砸自己的脚，自己被惩罚了”。

questions.text: What does 算了吧 mean?
options: 算了，放弃 | Let it go / Forget it
questions.explanation: 口语中表放弃、作罢，比如 “算了吧，别争了”，表不想继续。

questions.text: What does 妥了 mean?
questions.explanation: 东北方言，表事情办妥、没问题，比如 “妥了，放心吧”，口语常用。

questions.text: What does 主打一个 mean?
options: 主打一个… | The core is…
主打一个产品 | Main product
主打一个服务 | Main service
questions.explanation: 网络句式，用来强调核心态度 / 行为，比如 “主打一个随缘”“主打一个陪伴”，是年轻人的口头禅。

questions.text: What does 显眼包 mean in a cute way?
options: 爱出风头的小可爱 | Cute show-off
长得很显眼的人 | Noticeable person
喜欢包的人 | People who like bags
questions.explanation: 原略带贬义，现变可爱梗，指自带笑点、爱表现的人，比如 “德云社的显眼包们太搞笑了”。

questions.text: What does "下头" mean?
options: 让人扫兴 | Ruin the mood
questions.explanation: 形容某事让人感到扫兴、反感、瞬间没兴致。

questions.text: What does 搞事 mean in South China dialects?
questions.explanation: 南方多地通用方言，偏口语，可表贬义 “闹事”，也可调侃 “搞点事情”。

questions.text: What does "对齐预期" mean in a meeting?
options: 统一想法（避免分歧）| Align expectations
questions.explanation: 领导让大家想法一致，如 “先对齐预期，再讨论方案”，表统一方向。

questions.text: What does 方案输出 mean?
questions.explanation: 完成并提交方案成果。

questions.text: What does 掩耳盗铃 mean?
options: 捂耳朵偷铃铛 | Cover ears to steal a bell
questions.explanation: 比喻自己欺骗自己，明明掩盖不了的事偏要设法掩盖，是贬义词。

questions.text: What does 社牛症 mean?
options: 社交牛掰症 | Social butterfly syndrome
牛的社交行为 | Cow's social behavior
社交恐惧症的反义词 | Opposite of social anxiety
喜欢和牛社交 | Like socializing with cows
questions.explanation: 形容人社交能力超强，不怕生、敢发言，在任何场合都能侃侃而谈，社恐的终极羡慕对象。

questions.text: What does 趁热打铁 mean?
options: 打铁很热 | Hit iron hot
抓住时机 | Strike while the iron is hot
questions.explanation: 比喻要趁着有利的时机和条件去做事，不要错过机会，是中国经典谚语。

questions.text: What does "下饭" mean for a variety show?
options: 看综艺配饭（解闷）| Watch while eating
做饭（综艺环节）| Cook food
questions.explanation: 形容综艺有趣，适合吃饭时看，如 “这综艺太下饭，我能多吃一碗饭”。

questions.text: What does 网盘 mean?
questions.explanation: 在线存储文件。

questions.text: What does 躺平式恋爱 mean?
options: 躺着谈恋爱 | Fall in love lying down
不主动不付出的恋爱 | Love without initiative or effort
在躺平区谈恋爱 | Fall in love in the lying flat area
questions.explanation: 年轻人恋爱新方式，不粘人、不折腾、不追求轰轰烈烈，主打一个轻松自在。

questions.text: What does 别闹 mean?
options: 别调皮丨 Stop messing around
别吵闹丨 Don't make noise
别闹脾气丨 Don't be naughty
questions.explanation: 让对方停止调皮、胡闹。

questions.text: What does 剧透 mean for a drama?
options: 提前说剧情 | Spoil the plot in advance
透露嘉宾 | Reveal the guest
透露播出时间 | Reveal the broadcast time
透露拍摄地点 | Reveal the shooting location
questions.explanation: 追剧人的大忌，指有人提前公布剧情结局，比如 “别剧透，我还没看到最后一集”。

questions.text: What does 圈粉无数 mean for a celebrity?
options: 吸引了很多粉丝 | Gain a lot of fans
粉丝圈起来了 | Fans are circled
粉丝数量很多 | A lot of fans
喜欢圈粉丝 | Like to circle fans
questions.explanation: 形容明星因在综艺 / 影视中的表现好，吸引了大量新粉丝，比如 “他在节目上太可爱，圈粉无数”。

questions.text: What does "独在异乡为异客" express?
questions.explanation: 王维《九月九日忆山东兄弟》诗句，写在外地的孤独和思乡。

questions.text: What does 贼拉好看 mean in Northeast dialect?
questions.explanation: 东北话夸张夸赞，“贼拉” 是程度副词，比 “很、非常” 更有气势，比如 “这姑娘长得贼拉好看”。

questions.text: What does 你说了算 mean?
options: 你做主丨 You are in charge
questions.explanation: 表示完全听从对方安排。

questions.text: What does 亲戚称呼 mean?
questions.explanation: 中国亲戚称呼体系复杂，比如舅舅、阿姨、姑姑、伯伯等，是中国家庭文化特色。

questions.text: What does 倍速 mean?
questions.explanation: 调整视频播放快慢。

questions.text: What does 别介 mean?
options: 别这样，不要 | Don't do that
questions.explanation: 北方方言，用来劝阻、拒绝，比如 “别介，别客气”“别介，我来就行”。

questions.text: What does 真行啊 mean?
questions.explanation: 夸赞对方能干、厉害。

questions.text: What does 行吧 mean?
options: 行吧，勉强同意 | Alright / Okay then
questions.explanation: 口语中表勉强同意、无奈，比如 “行吧，就听你的”，语气带妥协。

questions.text: What does 脚踏实地 mean?
options: 踩在地上 | Step on ground
脚在地板 | Feet on floor
questions.explanation: 形容做事踏实、认真、不浮躁，一步一个脚印，是褒义词。

questions.text: What does 唠嗑 mean in Northeast dialect?
questions.explanation: 东北方言，指朋友间轻松的闲谈，如 “晚上来我家唠嗑”，偏口语化。

questions.text: What does 拉齐 mean?
questions.explanation: 让信息、认知保持一致。

questions.text: What does 栓 Q + 我真的会谢 mean?
options: 阴阳怪气的感谢 / 吐槽 | Sarcastic thanks/complaint
向栓 Q 道谢 | Thank Shuan Q
questions.explanation: 栓 Q + 谢的组合梗，可表无语、吐槽、无奈，比如 “上班迟到被扣钱，我真的会谢栓 Q”。

questions.text: What does 恢复 mean?
questions.explanation: 把数据还原到设备。

questions.text: What is 外卖？
options: 外卖 / 送餐 | Takeaway / Food delivery
questions.explanation: 指通过 APP 点单，商家送餐上门的服务，是中国年轻人日常吃饭的主流方式。

questions.text: What does 泰酷辣 mean?
questions.explanation: 谐音 “太酷啦”，源自网红梗，用来夸赞事物超酷，语气夸张有感染力。

questions.text: What does 面容 ID mean?
questions.explanation: 面部解锁手机。

questions.text: What is 龙 a symbol of in China?
options: Power and good luck | 权力与祥瑞
questions.explanation: 龙是中国的图腾，象征着权力、祥瑞、吉祥，是中华民族的文化象征。

questions.text: What does 同步信息 mean?
questions.explanation: 让大家掌握相同信息。

questions.text: What does 咯 mean?
options: 语气词，表提醒 / 确认 | Modal particle
questions.explanation: 句末语气词，表提醒、确认，比如 “好咯”“走咯”，语气轻松。

questions.text: What does 神反转 mean in a drama?
options: 剧情突然反转 | The plot takes a surprising twist
神仙反转剧情 | Godly twist plot
反转的神仙角色 | Twisted god character
剧情反转很神 | The plot twist is amazing
questions.explanation: 追剧的快乐源泉，指剧情发展完全超出预期，比如 “最后一集神反转，凶手居然是他，我没想到”。

questions.text: What does 向上管理 mean?
questions.explanation: 主动与上级沟通协作。

questions.text: What does 内存 mean?
questions.explanation: 设备运行程序的空间。

questions.text: What does 兜底 mean?
options: 承担后果丨 Cover the end
questions.explanation: 负责到底，承担风险。

questions.text: What does "辛苦了" mean from a boss?
options: 真辛苦（给加班费）| Real hard work
口头安慰（没实际奖励）| Verbal comfort
questions.explanation: 老板随口安慰，如 “今天加班辛苦了”，没有实际福利。

questions.text: What does 颗粒度 mean?
questions.explanation: 指计划、方案的细致程度。

questions.text: What does 兼容 mean?
questions.explanation: 设备 / 系统互相适配。

questions.text: What does 破圈 mean?
questions.explanation: 突破原有圈子，扩大影响。

questions.text: What is 京剧's main role type?
questions.explanation: 京剧有四大行当：生（男性）、旦（女性）、净（花脸）、丑（喜剧角色），缺一不可。

questions.text: What does 中 mean in Henan dialect?
questions.explanation: 河南话万能回答，别人问你 “去吃饭不？”，答 “中” 就完事，简洁又霸气，河南人的专属浪漫。

questions.text: What does 续航 mean?
questions.explanation: 设备电池可用时长。

questions.text: What does 聚焦 mean?
questions.explanation: 集中精力做核心事。

questions.text: What does 服务器 mean?
questions.explanation: 提供网络服务的主机。

questions.text: What does 心智 mean?
questions.explanation: 用户对品牌 / 产品的认知。

questions.text: What is 书法's five major scripts?
options: All of the above | 以上都是
questions.explanation: 中国书法五大书体：篆书、隶书、楷书、行书、草书，各有特色，风格迥异。

questions.text: What does 资源倾斜 mean?
questions.explanation: 把资源优先给重点项目。

questions.text: What is 粽子 eaten on which festival?
questions.explanation: 端午传统美食，由糯米包裹粽叶制成，分甜咸口，纪念屈原的传统习俗。

questions.text: What does 别客气 mean?
options: 别害羞丨 Don't be shy
别生气丨 Don't be angry
questions.explanation: 回应感谢的标准礼貌用语，最常用。

questions.text: What does 击穿心智 mean?
questions.explanation: 让用户深刻记住品牌。

questions.text: What does "哈哈哈～葱到我算是提到棉花啦" describe?
options: 性子软、好说话 | Soft personality, easy-going
葱很软 | Green onion is soft
questions.explanation: 谐音 “冲到我算是提到棉花啦”，形容人性格软，怎么说都不生气。

questions.text: What does 截图 mean?
questions.explanation: 截取当前屏幕画面。

questions.text: What does 恭喜 mean?
questions.explanation: 对喜事、成功、获奖表示祝贺。

questions.text: What is 红包？
options: 装钱的红包 | Envelope with money
questions.explanation: 中国传统习俗，春节、婚礼等场合长辈给晚辈 / 新人的装钱红包，代表祝福。

questions.text: What does 拼单 mean?
options: 一起拼着买更便宜 | Buy together for discount
questions.explanation: 电商平台常见玩法，多人一起拼单购买，享受更低价格，是中国网购特色。

questions.text: What does 主打一个真实 mean?
options: 核心是真诚 | The core is sincerity
主打一款真实产品 | Promote a real product
做人很实在 | Be a down-to-earth person
questions.explanation: 网络万能句式，用来强调自己的态度，比如 “今天不化妆，主打一个真实”。

questions.text: What does "一吃一个不吱声" mean?
options: 形容超爱吃某样东西 | Describe loving a food so much
吃了不说话 | Eat without talking
一口一个 | One bite one
questions.explanation: 年轻人美食梗，形容食物太好吃，一口下去直接沉默，只顾着吃。

questions.text: What does 摆烂式养生 mean?
options: 一边作死一边养生 | Indulge and keep healthy at the same time
摆烂的时候不养生 | No health preservation when giving up
养生摆烂的姿势 | Posture of giving up health preservation
用摆烂的方式养生 | Keep healthy by giving up
questions.explanation: 当代年轻人养生现状，比如 “一边熬夜一边涂眼霜，一边吃火锅一边喝凉茶”，主打一个自我安慰。

questions.text: What is "婵娟" in "千里共婵娟"?
questions.explanation: 苏轼诗句，“婵娟” 代指月亮，表和亲人共赏同一轮月。

questions.text: What does "哈哈哈哈被自己穷笑啦" mean?
questions.explanation: 搞笑自嘲，说自己穷到笑出声。

questions.text: What does 体感 mean?
questions.explanation: 职场指用户 / 员工真实感受。

questions.text: What does "春风又绿江南岸" mean?
options: 春天到江南（写景）| Spring comes to Jiangnan
春天到江南（写景）| Spring comes to Jiangnan
questions.explanation: 王安石诗句，“绿” 字用得极妙，写春天江南变绿的景色。

questions.text: What is 宣纸 famous for?
questions.explanation: 安徽宣城特产，是中国传统书画专用纸，质地柔软，吸墨性好，适合书法绘画。

questions.text: What does "工具人" mean in a variety show?
options: 会用工具（技能）| Can use tools
工具的人（道具组）| Tool person
被利用的嘉宾（打杂）| Used as a tool
工具爱好者（嘉宾人设）| Tool lover
questions.explanation: 指综艺中帮别人做事却没镜头的嘉宾，如 “他全程当工具人，太惨了”。

questions.text: What does 改天见 mean?
options: 明天见丨 See you tomorrow
改天再见丨 See you another day
再也不见丨 Never see you again
下午见丨 See you this afternoon
questions.explanation: 中文客套话，不一定定具体时间，表礼貌告别。

questions.text: What does 维护 mean?
questions.explanation: 服务器 / 系统定期保养。

questions.text: What does 听你的 mean?
options: 听声音丨 Listen to sound
听你说话丨 Listen to you
听你安排丨 Follow your plan
questions.explanation: 表示听从对方决定。

questions.text: What does 录屏 mean?
questions.explanation: 录制屏幕操作视频。

questions.text: What does 像素 mean?
questions.explanation: 决定照片 / 屏幕清晰度。

questions.text: What does 不见棺材不落泪 mean?
options: 不见棺材不哭 | Not cry until see coffin
不到最后不认错 | Refuse to admit until forced
questions.explanation: 比喻不到彻底失败、走投无路的时候，不肯死心、不肯认错。

questions.text: What does "海内存知己" mean?
options: 海内（国内）| Within the sea (domestic)
朋友在四海（友情）| Friends everywhere (friendship)
questions.explanation: 王勃《送杜少府之任蜀州》诗句，表友情不受距离限制，“天涯若比邻” 是下句。

questions.text: What does "有一说一" mean in a meeting?
options: 有一个说一个（数量）| One by one
客观说（先肯定再提意见）| To be honest
说一句话（发言）| Say one sentence
有一说一（规则）| Rule of one
questions.explanation: 职场常用开场，如 “有一说一，这个想法很好，但执行有问题”，表中立。

questions.text: What does 存储 mean?
questions.explanation: 设备保存文件的空间。

questions.text: What does "City 不 City" mean?
options: 城市不城市 | City or not
时尚不时尚 | Fashion or not
有趣不有趣 | Fun or not
有没有现代感 | Modern or not
questions.explanation: 问一个地方 / 事物是否时髦、现代化、有趣。

questions.text: What does 闪退 mean?
options: 软件突然关闭丨 App crashes
questions.explanation: APP 打开后突然自动退出。

questions.text: What does 不用了 mean?
questions.explanation: 委婉拒绝，不需要某物 / 帮助。

questions.text: What does 上线 mean?
questions.explanation: 产品 / 功能正式发布。

questions.text: What does 对牛弹琴 mean?
options: 对牛弹琴 | Play the harp to a cow
对不懂的人说话 | Talk to someone who doesn't understand
牛听不懂音乐 | Cows can't understand music
questions.explanation: 比喻对不懂道理的人讲道理，白费口舌，也用来讽刺说话不看对象的人。

questions.text: What does 卡顿 mean?
questions.explanation: 手机 / 电脑运行不流畅。

questions.text: What does 臣妾做不到啊 come from?
questions.explanation: 《甄嬛传》皇后名场面，皇后哭诉自己做不到不爱皇上，全网爆火，现用来调侃自己做不到某件事。

questions.text: What does 公测 mean?
questions.explanation: 软件对外公开测试。

questions.text: What does 项目排期 mean?
options: 制定时间表丨 Project schedule
questions.explanation: 安排项目执行时间计划。

questions.text: What does 名场面 mean in variety shows?
options: 经典的画面片段 | Classic scene
questions.explanation: 综艺里让人印象深刻的瞬间，比如嘉宾的搞笑发言、暖心互动，现用来形容一切经典瞬间。

questions.text: What does 近朱者赤近墨者黑 mean?
options: 靠近朱砂变红，靠近墨变黑 | Near cinnabar turns red, near ink turns black
和优秀的人在一起会变优秀 | Be with good people and you'll be good
喜欢红色和黑色 | Like red and black
朱砂比墨好 | Cinnabar is better than ink
questions.explanation: 比喻环境影响人，和什么样的人在一起，就会变成什么样的人，主打一个 “圈子很重要”。

questions.text: What does 啥 mean?
questions.explanation: 北方方言，日常口语中 “什么” 的意思，比如 “干啥”“啥意思”，非常常用。

questions.text: What does "社恐" mean?
questions.explanation: 怕社交。

questions.text: What does 俺 mean in Northern dialects?
questions.explanation: 北方多地（山东、河南、东北等）方言，第一人称，比 “我” 更亲切接地气。

questions.text: What is 中医's core therapy?
questions.explanation: 中医四大经典疗法：中药、针灸、推拿、拔罐，核心是辨证施治，标本兼治。

questions.text: What does 砍价 mean?
questions.explanation: 指买东西时和商家讨价还价，降低价格，是中国线下购物、菜市场的常见操作。

questions.text: What is "红豆" a symbol of in poetry?
questions.explanation: 王维《相思》“愿君多采撷，此物最相思”，红豆象征相思。

questions.text: What does 佛系青年 mean?
options: 信佛的年轻人 | Young Buddhists
无欲无求的年轻人 | Young people with no desires
喜欢佛系的人 | People who like Buddhism
佛系风格的穿搭 | Buddha-style clothing
questions.explanation: 网络流行人设，指对一切事情无所谓、不争不抢、随遇而安，主打一个 “都行、可以、没关系”。

questions.text: What does 反哺 mean?
questions.explanation: 用成果反哺团队 / 项目。

questions.text: What does 别忘啦 mean?
options: 别忘事丨 Don't forget things
别忘我丨 Don't forget me
questions.explanation: 口语化提醒，语气轻松。

questions.text: What does 不好意思 mean?
options: 不好意思吃丨 Embarrassed to eat
不好意思说丨 Embarrassed to say
questions.explanation: 道歉、打扰、麻烦别人时使用。

questions.text: What is 麻婆豆腐's main taste?
questions.explanation: 四川经典名菜，由豆腐和牛肉末制成，核心口味是麻辣鲜香，下饭神器。

questions.text: What does 众人拾柴火焰高 mean?
options: 大家一起拾柴，火焰会更高 | Everyone gathers firewood, the flame burns higher
人多力量大 | Many hands make light work
拾柴的人越多越好 | The more people gather firewood, the better
火焰高需要很多柴 | A high flame needs a lot of firewood
questions.explanation: 比喻大家团结起来，一起努力，就能办成大事，主打一个 “团结就是力量”。

questions.text: What does "因为他善" mean?
options: 无厘头回答一切问题 | Nonsense answer to any question
他很善良 | He is kind
因为善良 | Because of kindness
郭德纲的习惯 | Guo Degang's habit
questions.explanation: 源自郭德纲评书，现用来无厘头回答一切问题，主打一个万能梗。

questions.text: What does 杀鸡焉用牛刀 mean?
options: 杀小鸡用牛刀 | Kill a chicken with a bull knife
小题大做 | Make a mountain out of a molehill
大材小用 | Use a sledgehammer to crack a nut
杀鸡需要牛刀 | Need a bull knife to kill a chicken
questions.explanation: 比喻用大本事办小事，大材小用，比如 “这点小事让他来做，简直杀鸡焉用牛刀”。

questions.text: What does 呗 mean?
options: 语气词，表建议 / 同意 | Soft modal particle
questions.explanation: 句末语气词，表建议、同意、无奈，比如 “行呗”“就这样呗”，口语常用。

questions.text: What is 拉面 famous for in Lanzhou?
questions.explanation: 兰州拉面核心特色是手工拉制，可拉成不同粗细，搭配清汤和牛肉，味道鲜美。

questions.text: What does 下沉市场 mean?
questions.explanation: 指三四线及以下市场。

questions.text: What does 下架 mean?
questions.explanation: 产品从应用商店移除。

questions.text: What does 内测 mean?
questions.explanation: 软件小范围内部测试。

questions.text: What does 里程碑节点 mean?
questions.explanation: 项目重要阶段完成点。

questions.text: What does 狐假虎威 mean?
options: 狐狸借老虎威风 | Fox borrows tiger's power
仗势欺人 | Bully others by power
questions.explanation: 比喻依仗别人的权势来欺压、吓唬人，是贬义词。

questions.text: What does 划水 mean online?
questions.explanation: 指工作、学习不认真，摸鱼。

questions.text: What does "社牛" mean?
questions.explanation: 形容社交能力极强、敢说话、自来熟，是社恐的羡慕对象。

questions.text: What does 靠边站 mean?
options: 站路边丨 Stand by road
questions.explanation: 让别人让开，或表示不重要。

questions.text: What does 放心吧 mean?
questions.explanation: 让对方安心，不会出问题。

questions.text: What does "剧本痕迹" mean in a variety show?
options: 综艺有剧本（不真实）| Obvious script
剧本的痕迹（道具）| Script trace
写剧本（嘉宾任务）| Write script
剧本的痕迹（台词）| Script line
questions.explanation: 观众觉得综艺情节是提前设计的，如 “这环节剧本痕迹太重，不像真的”。

questions.text: What does 缓冲 mean?
questions.explanation: 视频提前加载数据。

questions.text: What does 刻舟求剑 mean?
options: 在船上刻记号找剑 | Carve mark on boat to find sword
固执不懂变通 | Stubborn and inflexible
questions.explanation: 比喻办事拘泥、固执，不懂根据实际情况变化而灵活处理问题。

questions.text: What does "你真是饿了" mean?
options: 形容接受度超高 | Describe extremely high acceptance
电视剧台词 | TV drama lines
太能吃了 | Eat too much
questions.explanation: 源自电视剧《如果奔跑是我的人生》，形容对某事物的接受程度非常高。

questions.text: What does 船到桥头自然直 mean?
options: 船开到桥头自然会变直 | A boat will straighten when it reaches the bridgehead
遇事别慌，总会有办法 | Don't worry, there's always a way
桥头的船都是直的 | Boats at the bridgehead are straight
船要开去桥头 | The boat is going to the bridgehead
questions.explanation: 比喻遇到困难不用焦虑，到时候自然会有解决办法，主打一个 “顺其自然”。

questions.text: What is 螺蛳粉 a specialty of?
questions.explanation: 广西柳州特色美食，由米粉、螺蛳汤、酸笋等制成，闻臭吃香，是网红美食。

questions.text: What is 端午节 to commemorate?
questions.explanation: 端午节是为了纪念战国时期楚国诗人屈原，有吃粽子、赛龙舟、挂艾草等习俗。

questions.text: What does 睇戏 mean in Cantonese?
questions.explanation: 粤语常用语，泛指看影视、戏剧，不单单指传统戏曲，日常使用范围广。

questions.text: What is 凑单？
options: 凑够金额享优惠 | Add items to meet discount
questions.explanation: 电商平台常见玩法，凑够一定金额享受满减、折扣，是中国网购省钱技巧。

questions.text: What does 靓女 mean in Cantonese?
questions.explanation: 粤语经典称呼，对年轻女性的礼貌且亲切的叫法，日常逛街、问路常用。

questions.text: What does "偷感很重" mean?
questions.explanation: 形容年轻人默默做事、不张扬、低调。

questions.text: What does 将就一下 mean?
questions.explanation: 条件不好时勉强接受。

questions.text: What is 高铁？
questions.explanation: 中国高铁技术世界领先，是长途出行的主流方式，速度快、准点率高。

questions.text: What does 客气话 mean?
options: 礼貌客套话 | Polite polite words
questions.explanation: 中国人日常社交常用，比如 “吃了吗”“别客气”“有空来玩”，是礼貌性寒暄。

questions.text: What does 打肿脸充胖子 mean?
options: 把脸打肿假装胖 | Slap face to pretend to be fat
假装自己很厉害 | Pretend to be powerful
胖子喜欢打肿脸 | Fat people like to slap their faces
脸肿了像胖子 | Swollen face looks like a fat person
questions.explanation: 比喻自己没本事，却硬要装出很厉害的样子，死要面子活受罪，比如 “没钱还抢着买单，打肿脸充胖子”。

questions.text: What does 亡羊补牢 mean?
options: 羊丢了补羊圈 | Fix the pen after sheep are lost
事后补救还来得及 | Better late than never
questions.explanation: 比喻出了问题以后及时想办法补救，防止以后再受损失，是积极的谚语。

questions.text: What does 高效协同 mean?
questions.explanation: 团队高效配合工作。

questions.text: What does 优先级 mean?
questions.explanation: 工作处理的先后顺序。

questions.text: What is 北京烤鸭 usually eaten with?
questions.explanation: 北京名菜，片好的烤鸭肉搭配薄饼、葱丝、黄瓜条、甜面酱卷着吃，口感丰富。

questions.text: What does 死机 mean?
questions.explanation: 设备完全无响应。

questions.text: What does "又幸福了姐" mean?
options: 姐姐真幸福 | Sister is happy
羡慕调侃的语气 | Envious and teasing tone
姐姐又幸福了 | Sister is happy again
questions.explanation: 女生之间的调侃，带点嫉妒的语气，比如 “你脱单了，又幸福了姐”。

questions.text: What is 广场舞？
questions.explanation: 中国中老年群体的特色健身活动，在广场跳集体舞，是中国城市文化特色。

questions.text: What does "恋爱脑" mean?
options: 恋爱中的人 | Person in love
为爱付出一切 | Love brain
questions.explanation: 为爱付出一切的人。

questions.text: What does 麻烦你 mean?
questions.explanation: 请求别人帮忙时的礼貌开头。

questions.text: What does 别多心 mean?
options: 别贪心丨 Don't be greedy
别多嘴丨 Don't talk much
questions.explanation: 安慰对方不要胡思乱想。

questions.text: What does 马上到 mean?
options: 马上来丨 Come right away
questions.explanation: 表示很快就到达现场。

questions.text: What does 卡点 mean?
questions.explanation: 工作推进的阻碍点。

questions.text: What does 半斤八两 mean?
options: 半斤重量 | Half a catty
彼此差不多 | Six of one, half a dozen of the other
questions.explanation: 古代 1 斤 = 16 两，半斤 = 8 两，形容双方水平、情况完全相当，不分上下。

questions.text: What does 过程管控 mean?
questions.explanation: 对工作过程进行监督。

questions.text: What does "显眼包男友" mean?
options: 很吸睛的男友 | Eye-catching boyfriend
爱出风头的男友 | Show-off boyfriend
questions.explanation: 形容男友很吸睛、走到哪都被看，也带点调侃。

questions.text: What is 奶茶？
questions.explanation: 中国年轻人最爱的饮品，甜度、配料可定制，是社交、日常消费的主流选择。

questions.text: What does "电子木鱼" mean?
options: 敲了积功德的表情包 | Emoji for accumulating merit
木鱼挂件 | Wooden fish pendant
questions.explanation: 年轻人解压神器，敲一下 “功德 + 1”，主打精神安慰。

questions.text: What does "再优化一下" mean from a boss?
options: 简单改（小调整）| Simple change
改到我满意（没具体要求）| Improve until I’m satisfied
questions.explanation: 老板没说具体改哪里，实际要反复修改，如 “这份方案再优化一下”，表不满意。

questions.text: What is 火锅's core feature?
questions.explanation: 火锅的核心是可自选锅底，边煮边涮各种食材，是中国经典的聚餐美食。

questions.text: What does 嘛 mean?
options: 语气词，表强调 / 疑问 | Modal particle
questions.explanation: 句末语气词，表强调、疑问、撒娇，比如 “好嘛”“干嘛呢”，口语常用。

questions.text: What does 酱紫 mean?
questions.explanation: 谐音 “这样子”，网络 / 口语常用，比如 “酱紫啊”“原来是酱紫”，语气可爱。

questions.text: What does 有空来玩 mean?
options: 有空来做客丨 Come visit when free
来玩游戏丨 Come play games
questions.explanation: 中国式客套问候，不一定真邀请。

questions.text: What does 颗粒度太粗 mean?
options: 细节不够丨 Not detailed enough
questions.explanation: 方案 / 计划不够细致。

questions.text: What does 清缓存 mean?
questions.explanation: 清理临时数据释放空间。

questions.text: What is 快递？
questions.explanation: 中国物流行业发达，快递是日常收寄包裹的主要方式，几乎覆盖全国。

questions.text: What does 凑合吧 mean?
options: 一般般丨 Just so so
questions.explanation: 表示勉强可以，不算好。

questions.text: What does 需求调研 mean?
questions.explanation: 调查了解用户 / 工作需求。

questions.text: What does 井底之蛙 mean?
options: 井底的青蛙 | Frog at the bottom of a well
见识短浅的人 | Person with narrow vision
questions.explanation: 比喻见识短浅、眼界狭隘的人，只看到眼前的小天地，看不到广阔世界。

questions.text: What does "圈粉" mean for a celebrity?
options: 粉丝数量（数据）| Fan number
圈子里的粉（粉丝群体）| Circle fans
粉丝圈（粉丝社群）| Fan circle
吸引粉丝（涨粉）| Gain fans
questions.explanation: 指明星因表现好吸引新粉丝，如 “他在综艺里太可爱，圈粉无数”。

questions.text: What does 别慌 mean?
options: 别慌张丨 Don't be flustered
questions.explanation: 安慰对方冷静，不要紧张。

questions.text: What does "我再想想" mean when asked for help?
options: 不想帮（委婉拒绝）| I don’t want to help
真的想（思考方案）| Really think
再想想（需要时间）| Need time
没想好（暂时不能帮）| Not ready
questions.explanation: 同事委婉拒绝帮忙，如 “这个忙我再想想”，实际是拒绝。

questions.text: What does 记得哦 mean?
options: 记得做丨 Remember to do
记得带丨 Remember to bring
questions.explanation: 提醒对方不要忘记。

questions.text: What is 糖葫芦 made of mainly?
questions.explanation: 北方传统小吃，又称冰糖葫芦，核心原料是山楂，裹上冰糖，酸甜开胃。

questions.text: What does 塞翁失马焉知非福 mean?
options: 塞翁丢了马，不知道是不是福气 | Uncle Sai lost his horse, not knowing if it's a blessing
丢了东西一定要找 | Must find lost things
马丢了是坏事 | Losing a horse is a bad thing
塞翁很倒霉 | Uncle Sai is very unlucky
questions.explanation: 比喻坏事可能变成好事，遇事别慌，比如 “这次没考上，塞翁失马焉知非福，下次会考得更好”。

questions.text: What is the main ingredient of 饺子？
questions.explanation: 北方经典面食，核心原料是小麦粉做的饺子皮，包裹各种馅料，春节必吃。

questions.text: What does 拔苗助长 mean?
options: 拔禾苗帮它长高 | Pull seedlings to help them grow
急于求成 | Be too eager for success
questions.explanation: 比喻违反事物发展的客观规律，急于求成，反而把事情弄糟。

questions.text: What does 耍起走 mean in Sichuan dialect?
options: 耍一下 | Play for a while
走一走 | Walk for a while
questions.explanation: 四川话日常邀约，“耍起走”=“一起玩”，比如 “周末去火锅，耍起走！”，主打一个四川人的潇洒。

questions.text: What does 迭代 mean?
questions.explanation: 产品 / 方案持续优化升级。

questions.text: What does 咋整 mean?
questions.explanation: 东北方言，“怎么办” 的意思，比如 “这咋整啊”，日常口语高频。

questions.text: What does "床前明月光" describe?
options: 夜晚景色（思乡）| Night scene (homesickness)
床上（睡觉）| On the bed
床前（门口）| In front of the door
questions.explanation: 李白《静夜思》诗句，写夜晚明月照床前，表达思乡之情。

questions.text: What does 可以吗 mean?
options: 行不行丨 Is it okay
questions.explanation: 征求对方同意、许可。

questions.text: What does 补位 mean?
options: 替补协助丨 Fill the position
questions.explanation: 主动替补协助同事。

questions.text: What does 得了吧 mean?
options: 算了吧 / 别逗了 | Come on / Stop it
questions.explanation: 口语中用来否定、反驳，比如 “得了吧，你别吹了”，表不相信、不耐烦。

questions.text: What is 包子 filled with usually?
options: Meat or vegetables | 肉馅或素馅
questions.explanation: 中式经典早餐，分咸口（猪肉、牛肉、蔬菜）和甜口（豆沙、莲蓉），按需选择。

questions.text: What does "葱到我算是提到棉花啦" mean?
questions.explanation: 形容性格非常软，好说话。

questions.text: What does 我先走了 mean?
options: 我走得快丨 I walk fast
不要等我丨 Don't wait for me
再也不来丨 Never come back
questions.explanation: 聚会、饭局离开时的礼貌用语。

questions.text: What does 借过 mean?
options: 借过一下丨 Let me pass
questions.explanation: 拥挤时请别人让路。

questions.text: What is the main taste of 臭豆腐？
options: Smelly outside, tasty inside | 外臭内香
questions.explanation: 长沙特色小吃，经发酵后油炸，外焦里嫩，核心特点是闻着臭吃着香。

questions.text: What does 热点 mean?
questions.explanation: 手机分享网络给其他设备。

questions.text: What does 清官难断家务事 mean?
options: 清官也判不了家庭矛盾 | Even an honest official can't judge family conflicts
家庭的事不用清官管 | Family matters don't need to be managed by honest officials
清官没有家务事 | Honest officials have no family matters
家务事很难断 | Family matters are hard to judge
questions.explanation: 比喻家庭内部的矛盾，外人很难说清楚谁对谁错，不好插手，比如 “他们夫妻俩吵架，我也没办法，清官难断家务事”。

questions.text: What does 贼拉香 mean in Northeast dialect?
questions.explanation: 东北方言夸张表达，“贼拉” 是程度副词，形容食物味道极其鲜美。

questions.text: What does 笨鸟先飞 mean?
options: 笨的鸟要先飞 | Stupid birds fly first
早起的鸟儿有虫吃 | The early bird catches the worm
鸟笨就飞不快 | Stupid birds can't fly fast
先飞的鸟都是笨鸟 | Birds that fly first are stupid
questions.explanation: 比喻自己能力不如别人，就提前努力，勤能补拙，比如 “我成绩不好，只能笨鸟先飞，早点起床学习”。

questions.text: What does 看情况 mean?
options: 视情况而定丨 Depends on situation
questions.explanation: 不明确答应，看情况再决定。

questions.text: What does 别催啦 mean?
options: 别催我丨 Don't rush me
慢慢来丨 Take your time
questions.explanation: 请求对方不要催促自己。

questions.text: What does "夕阳无限好" describe?
questions.explanation: 李商隐诗句 “夕阳无限好，只是近黄昏”，写夕阳美但快落山，表惋惜。

questions.text: What does "天生我材必有用" express?
options: 必有用（可能没用）| May be useless
questions.explanation: 李白《将进酒》诗句，表对自己才华的自信，乐观向上。

questions.text: What does 闭环思维 mean?
questions.explanation: 做事有始有终，主动反馈。

questions.text: What does 巴适得很 mean in Sichuan dialect?
questions.explanation: 四川话顶级夸赞，“巴适” 是舒服、好，“得很” 表程度，形容一切事物都好，比如 “这火锅巴适得很”。

questions.text: What does 快充 mean?
questions.explanation: 短时间充满电量技术。
